title: Validator pipeline guide secret-scan note
objective: Add one operational note to docs/guides/validator-pipeline-ko.md stating that secret-like values in handoff payloads are blocked by wrappers before model CLI invocation.
success_criteria: The guide contains a concise operational note that handoff secret-like values are blocked before model CLI invocation.
No wrapper, schema, or unrelated document behavior is changed.
The change is produced through scripts/run-generator.mjs actual execution.
The Generator result is validated through scripts/run-validator-a.mjs actual execution.
Pipeline artifacts and logs are preserved under tasks/handoffs/TASK-20260429-009/.

positive: Use the existing Korean guide style where practical.
Record command outputs, metadata, and pipeline artifacts for later improvement analysis.
negative: Do not include real secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Do not change wrapper code or schema files.
